## Pattern

What file or directory pattern looks noisy?

Example safe paths:

```text
dist/
reports/export.json
```

## Why it matters

Why might this waste AI coding context?

## Expected handling

What should AI Context Doctor do?

- [ ] Mark it as context waste
- [ ] Flag it for review before sharing
- [ ] Document it as a known pattern
- [ ] Not sure yet

## Safe example

Share only safe, minimal paths or synthetic examples.

Do not paste secrets, tokens, private code, private logs, or proprietary snippets.
